Hackathon</strong> feels different.</p><p id="d5c0" class="pw-post-body-paragraph mx my ho mz b na nb nc nd ne nf ng nh ni nj nk nl nm nn no np nq nr ns nt nu hh bg" data-selectable-paragraph="">This is not just a “build a cool app” competition. It is a challenge to use <strong class="mz hp">Gemma 4</strong>, Google DeepMind’s family of open models, to solve <strong class="mz hp">real-world problems</strong> in areas where AI can make a meaningful difference — especially in environments where privacy, accessibility, low connectivity, and trust actually matter.</p><p id="dd0f" class="pw-post-body-paragraph mx my ho mz b na nb nc nd ne nf ng nh ni nj nk nl nm nn no np nq nr ns nt nu hh bg" data-selectable-paragraph="">If you’ve been thinking about joining but aren’t sure whether you should register, this is the short answer:</p><blockquote class="om on oo"><p id="a3fd" class="mx my op mz b na nb nc nd ne nf ng nh ni nj nk nl nm nn no np nq nr ns nt nu hh bg" data-selectable-paragraph=""><strong class="mz hp"><em class="ho">Yes, register now.</em></strong></p><p id="3ef9" class="mx my op mz b na nb nc nd ne nf ng nh ni nj nk nl nm nn no np nq nr ns nt nu hh bg" data-selectable-paragraph=""><em class="ho">You do not need to have the perfect idea before you start. But you do need to start.</em></p></blockquote></div></div></div><div class="v cf oq or os ot" role="separator"><span class="ou bu bi ov ow ox"></span><span class="ou bu bi ov ow ox"></span><span ps pt pu pv bg" data-selectable-paragraph="">What is the Gemma 4 Good Hackathon?</h2><p id="1026" class="pw-post-body-paragraph mx my ho mz b na pw nc nd ne px ng nh ni py nk nl nm pz no np nq qa ns nt nu hh bg" data-selectable-paragraph="">The Gemma 4 Good Hackathon is a Kaggle-hosted competition focused on building <strong class="mz hp">impact-driven AI applications</strong> using <strong class="mz hp">Gemma 4</strong> models.</p><p id="de88" class="pw-post-body-paragraph mx my ho mz b na nb nc nd ne nf ng nh ni nj nk nl nm nn no np nq nr ns nt nu hh bg" data-selectable-paragraph="">The goal is simple:</p><blockquote class="om on oo"><p id="2108" class="mx my op mz b na nb nc nd ne nf ng nh ni nj nk nl nm nn no np nq nr ns nt nu hh bg" data-selectable-paragraph=""><em class="ho">Build something that solves a meaningful real-world challenge using Gemma 4.</em></p></blockquote><p id="8e32" class="pw-post-body-paragraph mx my ho mz b na nb nc nd ne nf ng nh ni nj nk nl nm nn no np nq nr ns nt nu hh bg" data-selectable-paragraph="">That “something” could be:</p><ul class=""><li id="939d" class="mx my ho mz b na nb nc nd ne nf ng nh ni nj nk nl nm nn no np nq nr ns nt nu qb qc qd bg" data-selectable-paragraph="">a real app</li><li id="3180" class="mx my ho mz b na qe nc nd ne qf ng nh ni qg nk nl nm qh no np nq qi ns nt nu qb qc qd bg" data-selectable-paragraph="">a local-first AI assistant</li><li id="550c" class="mx my ho mz b na qe nc nd ne qf ng nh ni qg nk nl nm qh no np nq qi ns nt nu qb qc qd bg" data-selectable-paragraph="">a domain-specific fine-tuned model</li><li id="60ba" class="mx my ho mz b na qe nc nd ne qf ng nh ni qg nk nl nm qh no np nq qi ns nt nu qb qc qd bg" data-selectable-paragraph="">a multimodal tool</li><li id="6fdb" class="mx my ho mz b na qe nc nd ne qf ng nh ni qg nk nl nm qh no np nq qi ns nt nu qb qc qd bg" data-selectable-paragraph="">an edge hp">meaningful</strong>.</p><p id="72ab" class="pw-post-body-paragraph mx my ho mz b na nb nc nd ne nf ng nh ni nj nk nl nm nn no np nq nr ns nt nu hh bg" data-selectable-paragraph="">The competition nh ni py nk nl nm pz no np nq qa ns nt nu hh bg" data-selectable-paragraph="">Most AI projects today are built for people who already have:</p><ul class=""><li id="2292" class="mx my ho mz b na nb nc nd ne nf ng nh ni nj nk nl nm nn no np nq nr ns nt nu qb qc qd bg" data-selectable-paragraph="">good internet</li><li id="664a" class="mx my ho mz b na qe nc nd ne qf ng nh ni qg nk nl nm qh no np nq id="4572" class="pw-post-body-paragraph mx my ho mz b na nb nc nd ne nf ng nh ni nj nk nl nm nn no np nq nr ns nt nu hh bg" data-selectable-paragraph="">But many of the places where AI could matter
